headline: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated Reports 2026 Second-Quarter Earnings
summary: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (Nasdaq: HBAN) reported net income for the 2026 second quarter of $727 million, or $0.33 per common share, an increase of $204 million, or 39%, from the prior quarter, and an increase of $191 million, or 36%, from the year-ago quarter, inclusive of $152 million of pre-tax Notable Items in the 2026 second quarter due to acquisition-related expenses.
